org.arakhne.tinyMAS.situatedEnvironment.body

Class AbstractAgentBody<PB extends PerceptionBody,IT extends Influence>

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.tinyMAS.situatedEnvironment.body.AbstractAgentBody<PB,IT>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    AgentBody<PB,IT>, SituatedObject
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    AnimalBody
    Deprecated. 
    See "http://www.janus-project.org"

    @Deprecated
public abstract class AbstractAgentBody<PB extends PerceptionBody,IT extends Influence>
extends Object
implements AgentBody<PB,IT>
    Agent body.
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND <galland@arakhne.org>

      Replies if this body was crashed.

      Convert the specified quantity specified in something per second to the same quantity expressed in something per simulation turn.

      Deprecated. 
      Set the perception characteristics of thi body.

      Deprecated.

    • Method Detail

      • freeze

        public void freeze()
        Deprecated. 
        Set if this body was freezed. A freezed body can not be moved.

      • unfreeze

        public void unfreeze()
        Deprecated. 
        Set if this body was unfreezed. A freezed body can not be moved.

      • isFreezed

        public boolean isFreezed()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies if this body was crashed. A freezed body can not be moved.
        Specified by:
        isFreezed in interface AgentBody<PB extends PerceptionBody,IT extends Influence>

      • getSimulationTime

        public double getSimulationTime(TimeUnit desired_unit)
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the current date of simulation.

        The unit depends on the environment's implementation.

        Specified by:
        getSimulationTime in interface SituatedObject
        Parameters:
        desired_unit - indicates the unit to use
        Returns:
        the simulation's time espressed in the specified unit.

      • getSimulationTime

        public double getSimulationTime()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the current date of simulation.

        The unit depends on the environment's implementation.

        Specified by:
        getSimulationTime in interface SituatedObject
        Returns:
        the simulation's time espressed in seconds.

      • getSimulationStepDuration

        public double getSimulationStepDuration(TimeUnit desired_unit)
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the duration of a simulation loop for this environment.
        Specified by:
        getSimulationStepDuration in interface SituatedObject
        Parameters:
        desired_unit - indicates the unit to use
        Returns:
        the simulation's step time.

        public double getSimulationStepDuration()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the duration of a simulation loop for this environment.
        Specified by:
        getSimulationStepDuration in interface SituatedObject
        Returns:
        the simulation's step time in seconds.

      • perSecond

        public double perSecond(double quantity)
        Deprecated. 
        Convert the specified quantity specified in something per second to the same quantity expressed in something per simulation turn.

        perSecond in interface SituatedObject
